global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with a clear call to action and promotional messaging.
global.main_message: Promoting travel bookings with flexible options.

elements.label: Purple background
elements.description: A solid purple background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the other elements.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Book your next trip' is centrally positioned, capturing immediate attention.

elements.label: Subheadline text
elements.description: Smaller white text below the headline reads 'Flexible booking options', providing additional information.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: A large square and a smaller circle are centered in the background, adding a modern design element.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circle is placed towards the bottom, complementing the geometric shapes in the background.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent yellow button with the text 'Book now' is located at the bottom, encouraging user interaction.
elements.text_content: Book your next trip Flexible booking options

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo 'CloudRoute' is displayed in white text at the top left corner, establishing brand identity.

elements.label: Secondary CTA
elements.description: A smaller yellow button with the text 'Book now' is positioned at the bottom, reinforcing the call to action.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small yellow badge with the text 'SALE' is located at the top right, indicating a promotional offer.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small tag labeled 'UGC' is placed at the top left, suggesting user-generated content is featured.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, modern and vibrant, travel booking, flexible options
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is centered, with the body text below it, and the CTA button at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Book your next trip, Flexible booking options, CloudRoute, Book now, SALE, UGC
